checks.finding: T-001's Requirements field contains only REQ-006 through REQ-017 and therefore introduces no dangling AC-NNN reference.
T-001 declares Blockers: None, which is the permitted literal form; blockers_format_valid is true, consistent with precheck-result.json.

requirements.md defines REQ-001 through REQ-017, but T-001's Requirements field covers only REQ-006 through REQ-017, and traceability.md contains no intentional deferral with rationale for REQ-001 through REQ-005. Those five requirements have no executable task ownership, making the decomposition incomplete; uncovered requirements are Critical under this check.

acceptance-tests.md defines AC-001 through AC-016, but T-001's Requirements field contains no AC-NNN identifiers. T-001 is not a test task under the role definition because its title lacks test/spec/verify and its Scope is not exclusively test-file changes; its Done When range therefore does not satisfy the required Requirements-field or test-task traceability path. No AC deferral appears in traceability.md, so all AC-001 through AC-016 lack the required task-level coverage and downstream verification ownership; this is Critical.
T-001 references REQ-006 through REQ-017 in its Requirements field, so it is not orphaned.

No task qualifies as a test task: T-001's title is 'Deliver the expanded full-profile bootstrap workflow' and its Scope includes production templates, scripts, prompts, metadata, and tests rather than exclusively test-file changes.
In attempt 1 round 1, T-001 declares Approval: Draft and Status: Planned as required.
T-001 declares Risk: high and Required Workflow: tdd, which matches the risk-gate matrix; precheck-result.json also records workflow_match_precheck: PASS.
tasks.md contains only T-001, so no AC-NNN can be claimed as a primary test target by multiple tasks.
T-001 has Blockers: None; dependency-graph.json lists the sole node T-001 and no dependency reference is unresolved.
BLOCKERS-FORMAT passed, and dependency-graph.json contains node T-001 with an empty edges array, so no cycle exists.

T-001 Scope combines several independently implementable concerns: layer templates and question-bank generation, the visualization guide, Bash/PowerShell checker modes, review-manifest and precheck changes, regression fixtures, and synchronized release metadata. These surfaces have distinct code targets and verification contracts, so one task prevents isolated implementation, review, dependency ordering, and rollback. This decomposition defect is Major because it is likely to cause implementation and verification mismatch.

Every T-001 Done When item names inspectable evidence or a binary result, including TEST-001 through TEST-019 failures, AC mapping results, compatibility tests, fail-closed cases, red-to-green logs under specs/bootstrap-interviewer-enhancement/verification/, the implementation report, evidence fields, and an isolated rollback fixture.
traceability.md contains a Task Mapping entry for T-001, the only task in tasks.md, and every requirement identifier present in traceability.md (REQ-006 through REQ-017) exists in requirements.md.
